acceptance_criteria: Effective configuration is versioned, hash-locked, explainable, and migrated only through a reviewed plan hash; plugin upgrades cannot silently activate authority, autonomy, gate, or budget defaults.

A versioned workflow-definition and event-sourced workflow-instance engine supports software-project, change-request, technical-assessment, and generic-governed-process presets without replacing the existing six SDLC execution phases.

Requirement ceilings and a separate non-reusable delivery profile preserve an explicit autonomy choice for every pull request or local release, with fail-closed action receipts and compatibility for existing v1 records.

Deterministic enterprise fixtures exercise at least 1,000 stories, 10,000 records, 5,000 dependency edges, and 100,000 trace events; orchestration and query remain within 2 seconds on Unix and 4 seconds on Windows, warm Observatory reads remain within 100 milliseconds on Unix and 250 milliseconds on Windows, and RSS remains within 256 MiB on Unix and 320 MiB on Windows.

Trace events are durably hash-chained with integrity verification, secret and PII protection is enforced at write and presentation boundaries, and every CLI or Observatory operation exposes a stable correlation ID and structured error envelope.

Operational metrics, liveness, readiness, redacted support bundles, SLI or SLO policy, and Observatory ETag plus single-flight caching are implemented without mutating canonical evidence during read-only requests.
Governance policies support deny-by-default RBAC, segregation of duties, quorum, immutable policy-decision receipts, and exact-scope enforcement at state mutation time.

Delivery uses a provider-neutral SPI with backward-compatible GitHub behavior and at least one additional generic provider implementation, including idempotent precondition and completion verification receipts.

A strictly read-only multi-project portfolio manifest and view aggregate health, active workflows, blockers, risks, budget, dependencies, and releases while degrading per unavailable project and never writing across roots.

The CLI offers hierarchical help, compact status and next-action guidance, composable presets, shell completion, deterministic import or export, and a plan-first local installer or updater with machine-readable output.

CI pins third-party actions, limits permissions and timeouts, runs functional and performance gates on supported platforms, verifies package contents, and produces SBOM, checksum, and provenance or attestation evidence.

All existing tests remain green, new negative and compatibility tests cover the enterprise behavior, atomic commits are pushed and merged to main, remote CI is green, and the personal local plugin is updated and verified byte-for-byte against the released source.

Every user-facing prompt, approval request, status, error, autonomy explanation, installer message, and Observatory summary starts with the plain-language outcome, practical impact, and next action; internal terms such as ceiling, audit_only, checkpointed, receipt, hashes, schema keys, and artifact IDs appear only in optional technical details.

Golden user-journey and readability tests prove that a non-specialist can understand what is happening, what is being requested, what approval permits, what remains protected, and what happens next without reading plugin documentation; Italian and English presentation examples preserve stable technical literals only where needed.
integrations: Git and GitHub through a provider SPI, with a generic Git provider and adapter contracts for GitLab or Azure DevOps.
Optional OpenTelemetry-compatible telemetry sink with a zero-dependency no-op or local JSON default.
Codex personal marketplace staging and local plugin cache installation.
nfrs: Security controls remain fail-closed and must not weaken path, symlink, boundary, TOCTOU, approval, or evidence-integrity checks.
Machine-readable output, exit codes, canonical hashes, and existing assessment and autonomy journeys remain backward compatible unless a versioned v2 contract is selected explicitly.
Performance budgets are deterministic and regression gates allow explicit platform tolerances rather than flaky wall-clock assertions.
User-facing communication follows progressive disclosure: plain product language first, concise reason and consequence second, technical diagnostics or governance vocabulary last.
non_goals: Build or operate a hosted SaaS, multi-tenant runtime, production deployment, distributed database, distributed lock service, or identity provider in this delivery.
Access production systems, secrets, private tenants, or destructive external operations.
material_scope.objective: Evolve Agentic SDLC into a useful enterprise-grade, local-first, provider-neutral control plane that can govern software projects, change requests, technical assessments, and generic project-creation processes with explicit configuration, scalable derived state, tamper-evident operations, usable workflows, exact autonomy, portable delivery, and auditable local installation.
requirement_constraints: The target project .sdlc directory remains the canonical source of truth; cache, indexes, portfolio snapshots, and metrics are derived and rebuildable.
Linux, macOS, and Windows with Node.js 18.18 or newer remain supported.
No approved immutable v1 record is rewritten in place; migrations are dry-run-first, hash-bound, idempotent, and recoverable.
No mandatory runtime dependency or external service is introduced unless the measured benefit cannot be achieved with the standard library and the dependency is explicitly justified.
material_scope.scope: Evolve Agentic SDLC into a useful enterprise-grade, local-first, provider-neutral control plane that can govern software projects, change requests, technical assessments, and generic project-creation processes with explicit configuration, scalable derived state, tamper-evident operations, usable workflows, exact autonomy, portable delivery, and auditable local installation.

approval.summary: Antonio required the approved enterprise program to make every user-facing explanation understandable to people who do not know the plugin. This approves revision R2, including plain-language-first and readability-test acceptance criteria.

scope.principle: A human approval applies only to the specific artifact or decision shown to the user before the approval.
